parameters.content:
## [Intake] CAIAC Lead Capture v2.0.0

CAIAC's own inbound lead capture from web forms (Typeform shape).
Replaces: CAIAC Demo - Lead Capture v1.2.0

**Trigger:** POST /intake/caiac/lead?slug=caiac
**Auth:** Add Header Auth credential to webhook node (x-caiac-key)
**Dedup key:** intake_fingerprint = deterministic hash of email
**DB gate:** caiac.leads INSERT happens before Sheet write
**PII boundary:** name/email/phone in Sheet only — never in caiac.leads
**AI scoring:** delegated to [Utility] Score Lead v1.0.0 (qualification score only)

Requires Step 0 migration + caiac self-client row to be seeded.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "error": "Invalid payload — expected Typeform body with data.fields array" }

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id              AS client_id,
  slug            AS client_slug,
  webhook_secret,
  config->'lead_capture'->>'notify_email'          AS notify_email,
  config->'lead_capture'->>'sheet_id'              AS sheet_id,
  config->'lead_capture'->>'field_map'             AS field_map,
  config->'lead_capture'->>'business_description'  AS business_description,
  COALESCE(config->'lead_capture'->>'from_name',  'CAIAC Digital')        AS from_name,
  COALESCE(config->'lead_capture'->>'from_email', 'caiacgroup@gmail.com') AS from_email
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $('Parse Tally Payload').first().json.slug }}'
  AND active = true
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM caiac.leads
   WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid
     AND intake_fingerprint = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.fingerprint }}'
   LIMIT 1) AS lead_id,
  (SELECT qualification_score FROM caiac.leads
   WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid
     AND intake_fingerprint = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.fingerprint }}'
   LIMIT 1) AS qualification_score,
  (SELECT qualification_score_reason FROM caiac.leads
   WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid
     AND intake_fingerprint = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.fingerprint }}'
   LIMIT 1) AS qualification_score_reason

INSERT INTO caiac.leads
  (client_id, crm_type, source_id, source_channel, lifecycle_stage,
   intake_fingerprint, qualification_score, qualification_score_reason)
VALUES
  ('{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid,
   'form',
   '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.fingerprint }}',
   'form',
   'intake',
   '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.fingerprint }}',
   {{ $('Score Lead').first().json.qualification_score }},
   '{{ $('Score Lead').first().json.qualification_score_reason.replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
ON CONFLICT (client_id, crm_type, source_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  qualification_score        = EXCLUDED.qualification_score,
  qualification_score_reason = EXCLUDED.qualification_score_reason
RETURNING id AS lead_id

INSERT INTO caiac.automation_runs (lead_id, automation_type, state)
VALUES ('{{ $('Insert Lead to DB').first().json.lead_id }}'::uuid, 'follow_up', 'pending')
RETURNING id AS run_id

UPDATE caiac.automation_runs
SET state = 'sent', sent_at = now()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Insert Automation Run').first().json.run_id }}'::uuid

INSERT INTO caiac.ai_usage_log (client_id, workflow, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_estimate)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid,
  '[Intake] CAIAC Lead Capture v2.0.0',
  {{ $('Score Lead').first().json.tokens_in }},
  {{ $('Score Lead').first().json.tokens_out }},
  {{ $('Score Lead').first().json.cost_estimate }}
)

INSERT INTO caiac.error_log (client_slug, workflow_name, node_name, error_message, payload)
VALUES (
  'caiac',
  '[Intake] CAIAC Lead Capture v2.0.0',
  '{{ $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted ?? ''unknown'' }}',
  '{{ ($json.error?.message ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.execution ?? {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
)
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT enabled FROM caiac.client_features WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Get Client Config').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid AND feature = 'intake'), false) AS enabled

parameters.responseBody: {"error": "This feature is not enabled for your account."}
